name: MLQ8
description: Made from same DNA template as ML8 sample. Fluorescence lifetime being IRF-limited, only showing a long-lived fluorescence lifetime.

references.citation: L. Liccardo et al. (2026), JACS

name: ML8
description: Exact structure unknown, made from same DNA template as MLQ8. Dual emissive cluster with a micro second lived decay. The cluster size is 18 or 19. Structural verification is needed.
reference: V. Rück et al. (2023), Ang Chem

references.citation: V. Rück et al. (2023), Ang Chem
D. Schultz et al. (2013), Adv. Mat

name: CsV5-20-21-22
description: No compositional information available. Amount of silvers and oxidation state are thought to be the same as parent cluster.
reference: C. Cerretani et al. (2017), Chem. Commun.
notes: No estimation of molar absorption coefficient has been calculated, as the 260 nm DNA peak is missing.

references.citation: C. Cerretani et al. (2017), Chem. Commun.

name: Rockstar
description: Molar absorption coefficient was determined to 150000 M^-1cm^-1 via FCS also.
